📌 *IMPORTANT NOTICE: PROJECT SUBMISSION* 📌

Dear Students,

> You are hereby instructed to prepare and submit your *Social Science Holiday Homework Project* without fail.

📅 *Submission Date:* **Wednesday, July 08, 2026**  
👩‍🏫 *Instructor:* ``Mrs. Shiva Joseph``

- ⚠️ *Please ensure your project is complete and meets all the guidelines provided in class. Late submissions will not be accepted.*

Thank you.
